text: Except as provided in Sections 23301.3 and 23301.5, a vehicle that enters into or upon a vehicular crossing is liable for those tolls and other charges prescribed by the California Transportation Commission.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 13. Vehicular Crossings and Toll Highways [23250 - 23336]
#### Article 3. Tolls and Other Charges [23300 - 23309]
##### § 23301

Except as provided in Sections 23301.3 and 23301.5, a vehicle that enters into or upon a vehicular crossing is liable for those tolls and other charges prescribed by the California Transportation Commission.

*(Amended by Stats. 2022, Ch. 871, Sec. 1. (AB 2949) Effective January 1, 2023.)*

subsections.text: Except as provided in Sections 23301.3 and 23301.5, a vehicle that enters into or upon a vehicular crossing is liable for those tolls and other charges prescribed by the California Transportation Commission.
